mapper.select: SELECT tag_idx AS idx, tag_uuid AS uuid, nm, created_by, created_at FROM tb_tag ORDER BY nm ASC
SELECT tag_idx AS idx, tag_uuid AS uuid, nm, created_by, created_at FROM tb_tag WHERE nm LIKE CONCAT('%', #{kwd}, '%') ORDER BY nm ASC

SELECT t.tag_idx AS idx, t.tag_uuid AS uuid, t.nm, t.created_by, t.created_at FROM tb_tag t INNER JOIN tb_brd_pst_tag bpt ON bpt.tag_idx = t.tag_idx WHERE bpt.brd_pst_idx = #{brdPstIdx} ORDER BY t.nm ASC
SELECT tag_idx AS idx, tag_uuid AS uuid, nm, created_by, created_at FROM tb_tag WHERE nm = #{nm}
SELECT tag_idx AS idx, tag_uuid AS uuid, nm, created_by, created_at FROM tb_tag WHERE tag_uuid = CAST(#{uuid} AS UUID)
SELECT tag_idx AS idx, tag_uuid AS uuid, nm, created_by, created_at FROM tb_tag WHERE tag_idx = #{idx}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO tb_brd_pst_tag ( brd_pst_idx, tag_idx, created_at ) VALUES ( #{brdPstIdx}, #{tagIdx}, now() ) ON CONFLICT (brd_pst_idx, tag_idx) DO NOTHING
